comment.body: Browning motion is always occurring. It’s a physics property of particles, the same concept applies to market price movement. It’s based on the probability of where a particle will go and usually fits into Gaussian distribution. The thing with markets is you have to account for jump diffusion as well
comment.raw_body: Browning motion is always occurring. It’s a physics property of particles, the same concept applies to market price movement.
